_note: Slug → kidbot character UUID + tight in-place attack prompt. Used by animate_enemy_attacks.py to submit 44 v3 west 16-frame attacks.
style_suffix: , in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster

enemies.attack: throws a single straight punch forward with one rotted fist at chest height, fist returns to neutral resting position next to body — tight in-place punch, no arm raising overhead, no forward step, stays inside character silhouette, seamless loop
